Class DiskReadTestTemp

Namespace
Pandowdy.UI._hold_
Assembly
Pandowdy.UI.dll

Temporary class for testing disk read functionality. Contains methods extracted from MainWindow for testing purposes.

DiskReadTestTemp(AppHook, Action<string>, Window)

Temporary class for testing disk read functionality. Contains methods extracted from MainWindow for testing purposes.

appHook AppHook

Application hook for DiskArc operations.

appendText Action<string>

Callback to append text to output.

window Window

GetDiskFileToProcess(string)

Shows a file picker dialog to select a disk image or archive file.

public Task<string?> GetDiskFileToProcess(string defaultStartLocation)

Parameters

defaultStartLocation string

Default directory to start in.

Returns

Task<string>

Full path to selected file, or null if cancelled.

HandleDiskRead(string)

Handles reading a disk image or archive file. Opens file picker, analyzes file, and displays contents.

public Task<string> HandleDiskRead(string lastDiskPath)

Parameters

lastDiskPath string

Last used directory path (will be updated with selected file's directory)

Returns

Task<string>

Updated last disk path after file selection
